// Printing terminal: printStackTrace on the caught prints it to stderr - visible,
// not swallowed. tackbox hunts silence, not style. The receiver must be the
// caught object; printing an unrelated throwable reports nothing about it.
class PrintStackTrace {
    private static final RuntimeException OTHER = new RuntimeException();

    void printsCaught() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }

    void printsUnrelated() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            OTHER.printStackTrace();
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
